definition: A typical example or pattern of thinking in a field.
example: Smartphones shifted the paradigm of personal computing.

definition: A tool that helps programmers find mistakes in code.
example: He set a breakpoint in the debugger.

definition: How plants use sunlight to make sugar from water and carbon dioxide.
example: Chloroplasts carry out photosynthesis in leaves.

definition: When pro teams pick new players; also the first rough version of writing.
example: She improved her essay after peer review of the draft.
Bees forage nectar across miles of fields.
